violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Remove protective transportation film from lower storage shelving at center prep station.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Make up air return vent missing cover.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed to reach in coolers and lower shelving around pizza prep stations.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ductwork needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a buildup of food & debris under equipment & shelving units in main prep area, dry storage, and dish area.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Label for original container of cleaning chemicals was not labeled as to actual contents. Chemical dispenser at 3 compartment sink is mislabeled.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
